docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,700.00 FILED BY K & K AUTO SERVICE AND BODY AS TO DEFENDANT MATI, TINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR K & K AUTO SERVICE AND BODY ASSIGNED TO NATIONWIDE RECOVERY NETWORK, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MATI, TINA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-24-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-28-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER STIPULATION.
NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO TINA MATI RETURNED--NO SUCH STREET

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-28-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-24-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 10-24-03 @ 10 AM AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF K & K AUTO SERVICE AND BODY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATI, TINA $3,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,200.00, DEFENDANT DEFAULTED ON THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
